name: Tiny FPS Customs
description: Navigate a freshly generated ray-cast customs maze and eliminate four visually warranted creatures without harming four protected look-alikes.
natural_language: Clear four warrants through the generated maze. Protected travellers must survive.

metadata.notes: A fresh connected 2.5D maze on every seed couples four close visual warrant matches to continuous wall collision, long-form navigation, and nearest-unobstructed geometric shooting.
